hook: A good follow-up makes the next step easy to say yes to or no to.
body: Specificity reduces friction because the other person is not left wondering what exactly you mean by wanting to continue.

hook: Vague follow-up can keep both people suspended in polite uncertainty.

body: Mentioning a concrete idea for next time often works better than saying we should hang again sometime.
